description: Desktop AppCore can send chat without HTTP localhost self-call.
Desktop memory search is available through SQLite FTS5.
Desktop system health reports sqlite and no Docker requirement.
Desktop backup manager writes a joibak file without secrets.
Desktop default task queue is sqlite.
Remote worker gateway is API based and does not expose SQLite directly.
Desktop Run Trace records prompt assembly, model call, cache fields, fallback flag, tokens, and latency.
